Phase-74.NAME: Admin Shell Navigation Login and Scroll Fixes
Phase-74.summary: Approved plan for admin login input padding, removing the admin Tariffs route from navigation, moving admin Logout under Nodes, and fixing admin shell scroll/rail geometry.
Phase-74.approved-by-operator: Operator confirmed Phase-72 through Phase-76 plan.

scope.in: frontend-admin login inputs, admin Layout navigation, admin route registration for Plans/Tariffs UI, admin rail height, main content scroll behavior, desktop/tablet/mobile admin CSS, and smoke coverage.
scope.out: Backend tariff catalog, payment plans API, user-facing tariff UI, deploy/install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, admin auth API, MTProto runtime, VPN runtime, and billing prices.

requirements.requirement-1: Admin login email/password text must not overlap envelope/lock icons.
requirements.requirement-2: The admin "Тарифы" section must be removed from the admin panel UI and navigation.
requirements.requirement-3: Removing admin "Тарифы" must not remove backend canonical tariffs or user-facing tariff purchase UI.
requirements.requirement-4: Admin "Выйти" must be placed under the "Ноды" navigation item so it is always visible.
requirements.requirement-5: Mouse-wheel scroll must work normally over the admin content area, not only near the left navigation.
requirements.requirement-6: The admin-rail navigation must be clipped/bounded to the same visible height budget as the main content area.

steps.step-1: Audit frontend-admin Login, Layout, route table, index.css, Plans page references, and Phase-54/58/62 smoke guards.
steps.step-2: Fix admin login field padding and icon positioning so placeholders and typed values never overlap icons.
steps.step-3: Remove the admin "Тарифы" navigation item and visible route entry points.
steps.step-4: Handle direct /plans access safely through redirect, hidden route removal, or route guard without breaking frontend-admin build.
steps.step-5: Preserve M-068 backend catalog and user-facing tariff cards unchanged.
steps.step-6: Move admin "Выйти" under "Ноды" while preserving logout token cleanup.
steps.step-7: Fix admin main content scroll container so mouse wheel works across the content area and nested panels do not trap scrolling incorrectly.
steps.step-8: Bound admin-rail height and overflow so navigation ends with the content viewport and does not visually overrun lower boundaries.
steps.step-9: Update admin smoke for login icon padding, no Tariffs nav, logout order, rail bounds, and content scroll markers.
steps.step-10: Run frontend-admin build, Phase-54/58/59/61/62 regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, diff check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard.

data-flow.flow-1: Admin opens /login -> icon-bearing inputs reserve enough padding -> typed credentials remain readable.
data-flow.flow-2: Authenticated admin sees sidebar -> Nоды then Выйти remain visible; Тарифы is absent.
data-flow.flow-3: Admin scrolls Users, MTProto, Analytics, or Nodes page -> main content scrolls from normal content mouse-wheel positions.

verification-design.gate-2: Admin smoke must assert no visible Tariffs nav and no stale route card for plans.
verification-design.gate-3: Static CSS smoke must assert icon-safe login padding, bounded admin rail, and content-scroll markers.
verification-design.gate-4: Tariff catalog smoke must still pass where user/backend catalog is protected.
verification-design.gate-5: Protected guard must prove backend billing, deploy, runtime, and user tariff purchase logic are not changed unexpectedly.

execution-evidence.source-changes: frontend-admin/src/pages/Login.tsx, frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx, frontend-admin/src/main.tsx, frontend-admin/src/index.css, scripts/phase74-admin-shell-navigation-smoke.mjs, and MyGRACE docs.
execution-evidence.behavior: Admin login inputs now reserve icon-safe padding; visible admin Tariffs navigation is removed; direct /plans redirects to dashboard; desktop Logout sits under Nodes; admin content owns the desktop scroll surface; the rail is bounded to 100dvh.
execution-evidence.protected-surfaces: Backend billing catalog, user tariff purchase UI, deploy/install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, VPN runtime, MTProto runtime, and admin API code were not changed.
execution-evidence.commands: cd frontend-admin && npm run build; node scripts/phase74-admin-shell-navigation-smoke.mjs; full regression suite recorded in verification files after final run.

risks.risk-1: Removing a route from navigation can leave a broken direct URL unless direct /plans is handled.
risks.risk-2: Scroll fixes can regress mobile admin usability if the shell uses conflicting fixed-height containers.
risks.risk-3: Admin tariff UI removal must not change the canonical server tariff catalog.

Phase-74.acceptance: PASS local: admin login fields are icon-safe, Tariffs UI is gone only from visible admin shell/direct route, Logout is under Nodes, admin scroll works across content, rail height is bounded, and admin/frontend/MyGRACE verification passes.
